title: C5 / A5 White Peel & Seal Envelopes Pack of 30
features: Pliage peut envoyer des letters, documents et feuilles de papier a4 une fois
Stampa di sicurezza non vedere attraverso
description: This is A5/C5 White Premium Paper High Quality Peel & Seal Envelopes. They are 30 envelopes in a pack. These are good for personal use and for official use. A5/C5 white envelopes are used by govt organizations, schools, offices, also for personal purposes to send documents or important documents or letters.
